aboutPage.title: 38+ years ensuring the continuity of industry in Mexico.
aboutPage.subtitle: Since 1986, the strategic partner that guarantees cutting-edge technology and immediate on-site response.
aboutPage.historyText: IPSA was born to solve critical procurement and service needs for the energy sector. What began as a response to immediate requirements transformed into a comprehensive EPC company. Today we design the future of industrial efficiency through global alliances and specialized human capital.
aboutPage.timeline1986: IPSA founded as a specialized supplier for the energy sector.
aboutPage.timelineExpansion: Expansion into the Oil & Gas sector with international representations.
aboutPage.timelineEPC: Consolidation as an EPC company with detailed engineering capability.
aboutPage.timelineAlliances: Global strategic alliances and presence in Houston, TX.
aboutPage.whoWeAreText: Ingenieria de Partes S.A. de C.V. is an organization founded in 1986, fully oriented to serving the industry. We provide our Service Division in the area of Automation and Control and our Engineering Division, with specialized technical force including project coordinators, application engineers, field engineers and product specialist technicians.
aboutPage.capacityNacionalText: Strategic stock in State of Mexico, Villahermosa and Ciudad del Carmen for immediate deliveries.
aboutPage.capacityHoustonText: Texas presence to streamline the international supply chain and high-specification procurement.
aboutPage.capacityTecnicaText: Application engineers and resident specialists ready for on-site consultation.
aboutPage.alliancesText: Exclusive representations of world-leading manufacturers. Official channel connecting brands like Perar, Masoneilan and Versa with Mexican industry.
aboutPage.alliancesCerts: Products certified under the strictest standards.
aboutPage.groupText: With MAEPSA and CERTUS, IPSA offers a 360° solution: from engineering to actuator manufacturing and parts commercialization.
aboutPage.ipsaDesc: Automation, distribution and representation of international brands.
aboutPage.maepsaDesc: Maintenance, repair and technical support of process equipment.
aboutPage.certusDesc: Self-contained actuator manufacturing in Houston, TX.
aboutPage.ctaFinalTitle: Looking for a partner for your next big project?
